description: Web application for task management with team collaboration features

userStories.title: User registration with email
userStories.description: Users can create an account using their email address and a password
acceptanceCriteria: User can register with email and password
Confirmation email is sent after registration

userStories.title: Task creation and assignment
userStories.description: Users can create tasks and assign them to team members
acceptanceCriteria: User can create a task with title and description
User can assign a task to a team member
Task has priority levels: low, medium, high

userStories.title: Notification service
userStories.description: Send push and email notifications for task updates
acceptanceCriteria: Users receive email when assigned a task
Users receive push notification on status changes
